subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Most Great Ocean desired to make mention of one of its waves, that this mention might draw it unto the station wherein it would speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البحر الاعظم اراد ان یذکر موجا من امواجه لیجذبه الذکر الی مقام تنطق فیه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness, @presence of; reunion with God
